sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# First, let's see the current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Current objects ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'b', 'B', 'G']:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")

# Click on top blue square and check for changes
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 17, 'col': 1}])
seg_after = current_frame.segmentation
print("\n=== After top blue click ===")
for n in seg_after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'b', 'B', 'G']:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
